name: @nextshell/mcp-ssh-proxy
description: Standalone MCP SSH proxy that reuses NextShell credentials

scripts.build: mkdir -p dist && bun build ./src/index.ts --outfile dist/index.js --target node --format esm --external @modelcontextprotocol/sdk --external zod --external better-sqlite3 --external keytar --external ssh2 --external socks && node ./scripts/write-release-package-json.mjs
